author: perrotta
body:
#### PR description:

Update the HI MC GT in autocond with all the conditions mentioned in [this cmsTalk](https://cms-talk.web.cern.ch/t/gt-mc-queue-request-for-a-pbpb-run-mc-queue-in-151x/128302/17?u=sayoo) and in [this presentation](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1655148/#5-follow-up-on-beamspot-condit).
Furthermore, it was updated in the previous version of this HI MC GT also the PbPb Centrality calibration tag as requested [here](https://cms-talk.web.cern.ch/t/2024-pbpb-calibration/136052/31).

Update the Run3 data GT with a snapshot as of 2026-03-17 08:48:50 (UTC), in order to allow the most recent Tracker Alignment payloads listed in https://cms-talk.web.cern.ch/t/gt-offline-new-offline-gt-with-updated-tracker-alignment-conditions/141387

The new GTs in autocond are 
- [151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_HI_v4](https://cms-conddb.cern.ch/cmsDbBrowser/list/Prod/gts/151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_HI_v4)
- [150X_dataRun3_v7](https://cms-conddb.cern.ch/cmsDbBrowser/search/Prod/150X_dataRun3_v7)

The differences with respect to their previous versions in autoCond are the following:
- https://cms-conddb.cern.ch/cmsDbBrowser/diff/Prod/gts/151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_HI_v4/151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_HI_v2
- https://cms-conddb.cern.ch/cmsDbBrowser/diff/Prod/gts/150X_dataRun3_v7/150X_dataRun3_v6

#### PR validation:

Rely on the PR tests

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

It will be backported down to the relevant production release cycles
title: Update HI MC and Run3 offline data GTs in autoCond
